title: WingmanConfig
description: Configuration for artists, venues, and map settings. Written by local UI.

center_city.description: Map home / default starting position, e.g. 'Des Moines, IA'

artists.description: Map of artist name to artist config

venues.description: Map of venue name to venue config

ticketmaster_api_key.description: Ticketmaster Discovery API key for the Coming Soon tab. Get a free key at developer.ticketmaster.com

spotify_client_id.description: Spotify app Client ID from developer.spotify.com/dashboard

spotify_client_secret.description: Spotify app Client Secret from developer.spotify.com/dashboard

paused.description: If true, artist is not fetched from TM but still used for venue cross-reference

favorite.description: If true, artist is a favorite (shown with gold star)

is_local.description: True if venue is in the local area (vs. travel destination)

paused.description: If true, venue is not fetched from TM
